Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: A secure rental booking request generated by a client.

id.description: The unique ID of the booking request.

date.description: Readable ISO timestamp of when the booking was made.

name.description: Total formal name of the guest.

phone.description: Phone number or WhatsApp coordinate of the guest.

message.description: Detailed notes or compiled booking request string containing car, dates, and instructions.

status.description: Current resolution status of this booking request.

bookings/{bookingId}.description: Collection of all incoming vehicle renter bookings and lead inquiries.
